description_long: This apartment building is a modern, boxy structure with three visible floors and a flat roof. The exterior is predominantly white, featuring large rectangular windows arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern on each facade. One side of the building showcases a prominent arched main entrance with glass panels and a black frame, while another side includes stepped balconies with glass railings, providing outdoor space for upper-floor residents. The building's design is minimalist, with clean lines and little ornamentation, emphasizing functionality and simplicity. The windows are symmetrically placed, and the balconies are staggered, adding visual interest to the otherwise straightforward geometry. The overall appearance suggests a contemporary urban residential building constructed primarily from concrete and glass.
description: A modern, white, three-story apartment building with large windows, a flat roof, and stepped balconies with glass railings. The design is minimalist and functional, featuring a prominent arched entrance.
description_view_0: This view shows a plain facade with three floors, four windows, and a single black horizontal accent; no entrance or balconies are visible.
description_view_1: This side features the main arched entrance with glass panels, several symmetrically arranged windows, and stepped balconies with glass railings on the right.
description_view_2: This view highlights the stepped balconies with glass railings, a vertical ladder-like feature, and a mix of windows and solid wall sections.
description_view_3: This side displays a plain wall with several windows and a partial view of the balconies and roof, but no entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with consistent spacing and alignment across all visible facades, contributing to a symmetrical and orderly appearance.
